releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Patch release for Obsidian Community review.

Changes:
- Renamed the settings section heading from the plugin name to Provider to satisfy the Community source-code review rule.

Release assets for Obsidian installation are attached below: main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Patch release for Obsidian Community review.

Changes:
- Replaced direct provider fetch calls with Obsidian requestUrl for chat completions and embeddings.
- Updated settings UI to use Obsidian Setting headings and removed deprecated slider tooltip usage.
- Updated timeout and workspace promise handling for Obsidian compatibility.
- Removed the builtin-modules package dependency.

Release assets for Obsidian installation are attached below: main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial public release of Vault Loom for Obsidian.

Highlights:
- Context-aware streaming chat inside Obsidian.
- Current note, selection, vault search, and optional semantic retrieval context.
- Agent mode with confirmed note actions.
- Desktop-only first release, compatible with Obsidian 1.12.7 or later.

Release assets for Obsidian installation are attached below: main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
